response.justification: Bogdan Szabo lacks the required C++ development experience on the Windows platform, which is a mandatory skill for this role. While he has extensive experience with C/C++ in embedded systems and Linux environments, his resume does not highlight any significant Windows-based C++ development or fixed-income/fixed-income derivatives domain expertise. His domain experience leans toward GIS, investment practices, and automation rather than capital markets or fixed income.
strengths: Strong general software development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to work in full-stack and multi-language environments
Demonstrated expertise in system optimization and performance improvements
concerns: No direct experience with Windows-based C++ development in capital markets
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets
Limited exposure to SQL Server or Oracle, focusing more on MongoDB and MySQL
